No Poverty.reason: The course's analysis of 'capitalism' (資本主義) provides a foundational understanding of economic systems and wealth distribution, which is relevant to poverty issues (Target 1.2).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly studies the 'Industrial Revolution' (工業革命) and 'capitalism' (資本主義), providing foundational context for modern economic structures and labor (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly covers the 'Industrial Revolution' (工業革命) and has a dedicated topic 'Technology and Man' (技術與人), directly linking to industrialization and innovation (Targets 9.2, 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The sociological study of 'modern society' (現代社會) and 'capitalism' (資本主義) inherently involves analyzing the origins and dynamics of social and economic inequality (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course explicitly addresses 'urbanization' (都市化) and includes a weekly topic 'City and Community' (都市與社區), directly aligning with sustainable urbanization (Target 11.3).
